# Configuration reference (`KDIVE_*`)

## build

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_BUILD_COMPONENT_ROOTS` | worker | ‚Äî | no | Colon-separated extra component roots merged into a build. |
| `KDIVE_BUILD_WORKSPACE` | worker | `/var/lib/kdive/build` | no | Worker scratch root for kernel builds. |
| `KDIVE_KERNEL_SRC` | worker | `` | no | Kernel source tree the worker builds from. |

## catalog

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_FIXTURE_CATALOG_PATH` | reconciler, worker | ‚Äî | no | Override path to the provider fixture catalog. |

## cli

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_CLI_CLIENT_ID` | ‚Äî | `kdivectl` | no | OIDC client_id kdivectl authenticates under (recorded as actor=operator-cli). |
| `KDIVE_SERVER_URL` | ‚Äî | `http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp` | no | MCP server URL kdivectl connects to. |
| `KDIVE_TOKEN` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | no | secret (ref only) |

## database

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_DATABASE_URL` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | ‚Äî | yes | Postgres DSN for the system-of-record. |

## debug

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_CRASH_DIR` | worker | ‚Äî | no | Directory for local kdump crash captures (live_vm path). |
| `KDIVE_DEBUG_DIR` | worker | `/var/lib/kdive/debug` | no | Directory for debug-session transcripts. |

## fault-inject

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_FAULT_INJECT` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | ‚Äî | no | Presence (1/true/yes) registers the fault-injection provider. |
| `KDIVE_FAULT_INJECT_ALLOCATION_CAP` | reconciler, worker | `1` | no | Per-plane concurrent-Allocation cap. |
| `KDIVE_FAULT_INJECT_SECRET_REF` | reconciler, worker | `fault-inject/console-sentinel` | no | secret (ref only) |
| `KDIVE_FAULT_INJECT_SEED` | reconciler, worker | `0` | no | Deterministic fault-engine seed. |
| `KDIVE_FAULT_INJECT_URI` | reconciler, worker | `fault-inject://local` | no | Synthetic host URI for the fault-inject resource. |

## health

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_HEALTH_BIND_ADDR` | reconciler, server, worker | `127.0.0.1:9464` | no | host:port for the aux health/metrics listener (/livez /readyz /metrics), distinct from the MCP port. Loopback by default ‚Äî the network boundary is its access control; widening it is an explicit act. When unset the port defaults per process (server 9464, worker 9465, reconciler 9466) so three processes on one host do not collide; an explicit value wins for every process. |

## http

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_HTTP_HOST` | server | `127.0.0.1` | no | Bind host for the MCP server. |
| `KDIVE_HTTP_PORT` | server | `8000` | no | Bind port for the MCP server. |

## install

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_INSTALL_STAGING` | worker | `/var/lib/kdive/install` | no | Worker staging root for install artifacts. |

## lease

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_LEASE_DEFAULT` | server | ‚Äî | no | Default lease window (hours) when a request omits one (built-in 4). |
| `KDIVE_LEASE_MAX` | server | ‚Äî | no | Hard cap (hours) on a lease window / renewal (built-in 24). |

## local-libvirt

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_LIBVIRT_ALLOCATION_CAP` | reconciler, worker | `1` | no | Per-host concurrent-Allocation cap. |
| `KDIVE_LIBVIRT_URI` | reconciler, worker | `qemu:///system` | no | libvirt connection URI for the local host. |

## logging

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_LOG_LEVEL` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | `INFO` | no | Structured-logging level (overridable by --log-level). |

## objectstore

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_S3_BUCKET` | reconciler, server, worker | ‚Äî | no | Bucket holding vmcores, transcripts, and uploads. |
| `KDIVE_S3_ENDPOINT_URL` | reconciler, server, worker | ‚Äî | no | S3-compatible endpoint URL for bulk artifacts. |
| `KDIVE_S3_REGION` | reconciler, server, worker | `us-east-1` | no | Region for the object-store client. |

## oidc

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_OIDC_AUDIENCE` | server | ‚Äî | yes | Expected token audience (aud), enforced natively. |
| `KDIVE_OIDC_ISSUER` | server | ‚Äî | yes | Expected token issuer (iss), enforced natively. |
| `KDIVE_OIDC_JWKS_URI` | server | ‚Äî | yes | JWKS URI the bearer-token verifier fetches signing keys from. |

## otel

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_OTEL_ENABLED` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | ‚Äî | no | Presence (1/true/yes) enables OTLP export of logs/metrics/traces (default off). |
| `KDIVE_OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | ‚Äî | no | OTLP/gRPC collector endpoint; required when KDIVE_OTEL_ENABLED is set. |
| `KDIVE_OTEL_SERVICE_NAMESPACE` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | `kdive` | no | service.namespace resource attribute on all emitted telemetry. |
| `KDIVE_OTEL_TRACES_SAMPLER_RATIO` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | `0.1` | no | Parent-based ratio trace sampler ratio in [0, 1] (default 0.1). |

## remote-libvirt

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_ALLOCATION_CAP` | reconciler, worker | `1` | no | Per-host concurrent-Allocation cap. |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_CA_CERT_REF` | reconciler, worker | ‚Äî | conditional | secret (ref only) |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_CLIENT_CERT_REF` | reconciler, worker | ‚Äî | conditional | secret (ref only) |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_CLIENT_KEY_REF` | reconciler, worker | ‚Äî | conditional | secret (ref only) |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_GDB_ADDR` | reconciler, worker | ‚Äî | no | gdbstub listen address (ACL'd boundary; no default, fails closed if unset). |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_GDB_PORT_MAX` | reconciler, worker | `47099` | no | High end of the gdbstub port range. |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_GDB_PORT_MIN` | reconciler, worker | `47000` | no | Low end of the gdbstub port range. |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_MACHINE` | reconciler, worker | `pc` | no | QEMU machine type (pc/i440fx by default; q35 opt-in). |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_NETWORK` | reconciler, worker | `default` | no | libvirt network for guests. |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_STORAGE_POOL` | reconciler, worker | `default` | no | libvirt storage pool for guest disks. |
| `KDIVE_REMOTE_LIBVIRT_URI` | reconciler, worker | ‚Äî | no | qemu+tls host URI; its presence enables the remote-libvirt provider. |

## secrets

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_SECRETS_ROOT` | reconciler, server, worker | `/var/lib/kdive/secrets` | no | Root directory for the file-ref secret backend. |

## ssh

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_SSH_KEY_DIR` | worker | ‚Äî | no | Override for the managed SSH keypair directory (absolute). Read standalone by the builder's host python; documented here for the contract. |

## upload

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES` | server | `5368709120` | no | Maximum accepted upload size in bytes. |
| `KDIVE_UPLOAD_TTL_SECONDS` | server | `86400` | no | Presigned upload-URL TTL in seconds. |
